title: Chibify
body:
Changes how players are rendered to make them look like chibis
![SelfChibi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a74d710e52c9e4178e937b9eb7a5c5c93514b218.png)![Other players as chibi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09cecb7d2f153a6909711a759cb9f1b67f42ef1.png)
